scripts.build: npm run build -w @carapace/core && npm run build -w @carapace/adapter-openclaw && npm run build -w @carapace/adapter-mcp && npm run build -w @carapace/adapter-langchain && npm run build -w @carapace/dashboard && npm run build -w @carapace/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @carapace/core && npm run test -w @carapace/adapter-openclaw && npm run test -w @carapace/adapter-mcp && npm run test -w @carapace/adapter-langchain && npm run test -w @carapace/dashboard && npm run test -w @carapace/cli
